description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 5

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, H, X

Infusing a small bit of sand or dirt with Chakra, it forms into an eye that can see up to 150 ft away using normal vision and your Spot check modifier, though you suffer a -4 penalty to Spot checks while it is active (penalty does not affect the eye's spot check modifier).

You can command the eye freely; it is a Fine construct with a fly speed of 30 ft (good maneuverability), a +16 Hide modifier, a +8 size bonus to Defense and has 1d4 HP. If it moves past the technique's range or is destroyed, it vanishes without a trace. The eye is subject to genjutsu and vision altering effects as though it were you.
